message:
feat(refinery): add post-squash gate phase for pre-push validation

Extends the existing gate system with a `phase` field instead of adding
a parallel `pre_merge_checks` concept. Gates can now run at two points:

- `pre-merge` (default): before the squash merge, on the source branch
- `post-squash`: after squash merge but before push, on combined code

Post-squash gates catch issues that only manifest in the merged result
(broken imports, boot failures, missing templates). On failure, the
merge is reset and the failure is reported back to the polecat.

Config example:
  "gates": {
    "lint": {"cmd": "golangci-lint run", "timeout": "2m"},
    "build-check": {"cmd": "go build ./...", "phase": "post-squash"}
  }

Based on the idea from PR #2967 (Jaredjaskot), refactored to use a
single gate config surface with a phase parameter rather than a separate
pre_merge_checks concept.

Co-Authored-By: Jaredjaskot <noreply@users.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
